title: ilex rubra
intro: Ilex rubra, also known as the red-berried holly or Chinese holly, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the leaves, which contain alkaloids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex rubra include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Ilex rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
